positive: A celestial geometric woodland scene with glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. The composition features stylized, interconnected elements forming a balanced, symmetrical vignette suitable for apparel printing. Dominant colors are deep indigo, sapphire blue, ethereal teal, and pops of gold leaf luminescence. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau curvature and minimalist, clean silhouette graphic design, reminiscent of engraved illustrations. Include stylized mushrooms, swirling nebulae patterns, and delicately outlined forest sprites in a peaceful, nocturnal atmosphere. High contrast, clean lines, centered composition, vector art quality, suitable for single-color or limited-color screen printing.
